markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new employees to GrowthX, introducing company tools and processes.](https://fathom.video/share/PC9H_CsdBX6wHJZYa__HByrHe9K1sixz?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX uses a suite of tools including Slack, Geekbot, Linear, Notion, and others for communication and project management](https://fathom.video/share/PC9H_CsdBX6wHJZYa__HByrHe9K1sixz?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Onboarding resources are available in Notion and Linear, with tasks tracked in Linear for day 1 and week 1](https://fathom.video/share/PC9H_CsdBX6wHJZYa__HByrHe9K1sixz?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [Employees are expected to have 4 hours overlap with Pacific time and provide daily Geekbot updates](https://fathom.video/share/PC9H_CsdBX6wHJZYa__HByrHe9K1sixz?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [GrowthX has an unlimited PTO policy with a simple calendar-blocking process for time off](https://fathom.video/share/PC9H_CsdBX6wHJZYa__HByrHe9K1sixz?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

## Topics

### Company Tools Introduction

  - [Slack: Primary tool for agent chats and team communication](https://fathom.video/share/PC9H_CsdBX6wHJZYa__HByrHe9K1sixz?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Geekbot: Integrated with Slack for daily stand-ups and updates](https://fathom.video/share/PC9H_CsdBX6wHJZYa__HByrHe9K1sixz?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Linear: Project management tool, used for raising IT tickets and tracking tasks](https://fathom.video/share/PC9H_CsdBX6wHJZYa__HByrHe9K1sixz?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Notion: Knowledge management platform for databases and client workspaces](https://fathom.video/share/PC9H_CsdBX6wHJZYa__HByrHe9K1sixz?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [Additional tools: Airtable, Loom (screen recording), Zoom (meetings), Fathom (call recording)](https://fathom.video/share/PC9H_CsdBX6wHJZYa__HByrHe9K1sixz?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)

### Onboarding Process

  - [Resources available in Notion handbook and duplicated in Linear for task tracking](https://fathom.video/share/PC9H_CsdBX6wHJZYa__HByrHe9K1sixz?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [Day 1 focus: Setting up tools, meeting managers and onboarding buddy](https://fathom.video/share/PC9H_CsdBX6wHJZYa__HByrHe9K1sixz?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [Week 1 includes reading materials, watching videos on company history and working model](https://fathom.video/share/PC9H_CsdBX6wHJZYa__HByrHe9K1sixz?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
  - [Three key meetings: current onboarding, CEO strategy/vision, and customer use cases](https://fathom.video/share/PC9H_CsdBX6wHJZYa__HByrHe9K1sixz?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)

### Company Policies and Expectations

  - [4 hours minimum overlap with Pacific time required](https://fathom.video/share/PC9H_CsdBX6wHJZYa__HByrHe9K1sixz?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [Daily Geekbot updates are mandatory](https://fathom.video/share/PC9H_CsdBX6wHJZYa__HByrHe9K1sixz?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Unlimited PTO policy: No approval needed, just calendar blocking with adequate notice](https://fathom.video/share/PC9H_CsdBX6wHJZYa__HByrHe9K1sixz?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Employee referral program: Up to $10k USD for engineering roles, $5k USD for non-engineering (after 6 months)](https://fathom.video/share/PC9H_CsdBX6wHJZYa__HByrHe9K1sixz?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)

### Team Communication

  - <team@growthxlabs.com> email setup for accessing tools and scheduling client calls
  - [Biweekly all-hands meetings where new employees introduce themselves](https://fathom.video/share/PC9H_CsdBX6wHJZYa__HByrHe9K1sixz?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [IT and tools Slack channel for technical support](https://fathom.video/share/PC9H_CsdBX6wHJZYa__HByrHe9K1sixz?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Complete day 1 and week 1 tasks in Linear](https://fathom.video/share/PC9H_CsdBX6wHJZYa__HByrHe9K1sixz?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Watch onboarding bootcamp recordings before meetings with Marcel (CEO) and Kyle](https://fathom.video/share/PC9H_CsdBX6wHJZYa__HByrHe9K1sixz?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
  - Set up <team@growthxlabs.com> email account using 1Password credentials
  - Block calendar for any planned time off, adding <team@growthxlabs.com>
  - [Reach out to Alice for any issues or questions during onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/PC9H_CsdBX6wHJZYa__HByrHe9K1sixz?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
